rationale: Educ. Code §48.161 governs per-student basic cost allotments and permissible uses. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct textual conflict arises.
quote: A school district is entitled to an annual allotment of $106 for each student enrolled in the district.
_note: No direct reference to homestead exemption in rule text. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue is a budgetary concern, not a textual conflict with this section.
